stale_claims.patched_fact: The default local embedding model is now all-MiniLM-L6-v2 with 384 dimensions (was all-mpnet-base-v2 with 768).
Ranking now selects at least 5 claims (minimumSelectedClaims = 5, was 3).

instructions: Classify whether the candidate update proposal correctly re-verifies each stale claim after the session patch.
Do not compute a numeric score. The eval runner computes all scores locally.
The session patch changed only libs/knowledge-graph/graph-context/config.ts. Use patch_summary and each stale claim's patched_fact as the only truth about the new code.
For each stale claim, decide whether the candidate proposal contains a replacement claim that states the patched fact. Match by meaning, not by claim id or exact wording.
Set correction_present true when any candidate claim supersedes or restates that stale claim's topic, even if the value is wrong.

Set correction_correct true only when the replacement claim states the new patched value accurately (e.g. all-MiniLM-L6-v2 / 384, or minimumSelectedClaims 5). A replacement that repeats the old value is not correct.
Judge only the two stale claims listed. Do not reward or penalize claims about storage or unrelated topics here; the runner checks those structurally.
judge.patch_summary: config.ts: graphContextConfig.embedding.model all-mpnet-base-v2 -> all-MiniLM-L6-v2 and dimensions 768 -> 384; rankingConfig.minimumSelectedClaims 3 -> 5.

corrections.expected_correction: A replacement claim states the default local embedding is now all-MiniLM-L6-v2 with 384 dimensions.
A replacement claim states minimumSelectedClaims is now 5.
